name: Brie Topped with Blueberry Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Boil for 1 minute.
4. Remove the cinnamon stick.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 30-45 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Bake brie on an ungreased cookie sheet for 10-12 minutes, or until soft.
8. Place brie on a serving plate, and top with the cold chutney.
9. Serve with a very mild-flavored cracker.
